heading: Boolarra South vs Boolite — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boolarra South, Victoria and Boolite, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boolarra South has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Boolite (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boolarra South or Boolite safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boolarra South has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Boolite scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boolarra South scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Boolite scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boolarra South or Boolite?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boolarra South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
